overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit urban street. The player character walks along a sidewalk past palm trees and towering holographic billboards, then turns into a parking lot and enters a black sports car.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit urban sidewalk with holographic billboards

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the concrete sidewalk through the cyberpunk city street, observing the towering neon advertisements ahead

entered.detail: tall skyscrapers covered in bright holographic advertisements and neon signage dominating the skyline
tall palm trees lining the left side of the street
large green industrial dumpster on the sidewalk
weathered concrete pavement with red painted curbs
low-rise commercial buildings with lit windows and signage
empty asphalt road running parallel to the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking along a neon-lit sidewalk in a cyberpunk city at night. Tall towers with holographic advertisements dominate the skyline ahead, while palm trees and urban buildings line the path. The street is empty and the atmosphere is illuminated by vibrant neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection approach with commercial buildings

events.description: passes a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction on the left side

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along the sidewalk and passing a pedestrian while approaching an intersection

notable_agents.action: walking past the player in the opposite direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: street intersection with traffic lights and crosswalks visible ahead
two-story commercial structures with illuminated storefronts
tall street lamp casting light on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the sidewalk and passing a pedestrian walking the opposite way. The scene opens toward an intersection with commercial buildings visible on the right and street lights illuminating the path ahead.

events.description: turns right off the sidewalk into the asphalt parking lot
approaches and enters the black sports car, transitioning from exterior to interior view

agents.ego_description: turning into the parking lot and approaching the black sports car to enter it

entered.detail: open asphalt parking area with scattered debris and overgrown weeds
elevated highway ramp structure casting shadows over the lot
brick wall with large white graffiti spelling BROKEN
sleek black futuristic sports car with illuminated taillights
steam rising from a vent in the parking lot
luxury car interior with white leather seats and green accent lighting

segments.scene_description: Turning into a dimly lit parking lot beneath an overpass, approaching a sleek black sports car parked near a wall with BROKEN graffiti. Steam rises from a vent nearby as the character enters the vehicle, transitioning to the car's luxurious interior view with white leather seats and green neon accent lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a vibrant, neon-lit urban boulevard into the secluded interior of a high-end vehicle. It begins with a walk along a deserted sidewalk beneath towering holographic advertisements and palm trees, where the skyline is bathed in brilliant artificial light. As the camera moves forward, it passes a lone pedestrian and opens toward a wide intersection lined with commercial buildings and glowing street lamps. The scene then shifts as the camera turns away from the main road into a dimly lit parking lot beneath an overpass, gliding past rising steam and a wall marked with broken graffiti toward a sleek black sports car. Finally, the perspective transitions seamlessly from the gritty exterior into the luxurious cabin of the car, settling among white leather seats accented by soft green neon lighting.
